# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: frontend-server
  namespace: frontend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: frontend
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: backend-server
  namespace: backend
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: backend
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: database-server
  namespace: database
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: database
  port: 5432
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  identity: 
    - "spiffe://cluster.local/ns/frontend/sa/frontend-svc-account"
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  identity: 
    - "spiffe://cluster.local/ns/backend/sa/backend-svc-account"
  port: 5432
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: frontend-to-backend-port-8080
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  identity: 
    - "spiffe://cluster.local/ns/frontend/sa/frontend-svc-account"
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-to-database-port-5432
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  identity: 
    - "spiffe://cluster.local/ns/backend/sa/backend-svc-account"
  port: 5432
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: backend-allow-frontend
  namespace: backend
spec:
  server:
    name: backend-server
    namespace: backend
  identity: 
    - "spiffe://cluster.local/ns/frontend/sa/frontend-svc-account"
  port: 8080
---
apiVersion: linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: database-allow-backend
  namespace: database
spec:
  server:
    name: database-server
    namespace: database
  identity: 
    - "spiffe://cluster.local/ns/backend/sa/backend-svc-account"
  port: 5432
